steps.assistant_text: -O0 fresh-dest value-load cracked by LITERAL cast-pointer deref: the symbol read 'D_A0000200 == 0xAC290000' emits lui t5,%hi; lw t5,%lo(t5) (base-reg REUSE, version-invariant, permuter-immune 551k). Spelling the read as '*(int*)0xA0000200 == 0xAC290000' makes the address a constant expression: -O0 gives the address its own temp (lui t5,0xA000) and the VALUE a fresh temp (lw t6,0x200(t5)) with the low16 folded into the load offset - exact target bytes, reloc-free (matches the baked-USO absolute form). The 06-09/06-11 negative sweeps only probed the SYMBOL spelling (extern int / volatile / struct member / array form / zero-lo array base); the literal-address axis was untested.
